statement.en: Branding (Dis)enchantment: Exploring employer brand communications and the lived experience of employees in UK fast fashion retail.
statement.summary: This thesis seeks to understand the ‘work’ that brand discourse does within the employer-employee nexus in the UK fast fashion retail sector, examining both the production of a brand discourse by the organisation, and the consumption of that discourse by shopfloor employees.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is an empirical qualitative research thesis (2026, not yet published/validated) examining lived experience and discourse interpretation. It presents findings under construction, not established fact. The phenomena studied (employer brand perception gaps, employee sense-making) are observable but interpretation is provisional and context-dependent.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 約束されたブランド像と実際の労働体験の乖離が、幻想の解除へと変換される。
